system.docHtml: Ki'ichek is a tongue of the Ki'ichek (independent isolate) family. Fluency measures the sophistication of expression in Ki'ichek, from the halting phrases of a traveler to the nuanced and learned discourse of a native speaker. As with all specific languages, this skill inherits its mechanics from the general [[Language]] skill; see [[Ki.ichek_Language|Ki'ichek Language]] for the linguistic and cultural background of the tongue itself.
